title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.130 - Suit on bond, by whom and when brought — damages
text:
426.130.  Suit on bond, by whom and when brought — damages. — Any person injured by a breach of the condition of the bond may sue thereon in the name of the state to his use, and the damages shall be assessed as on bonds with collateral conditions.
(RSMo 1939 § 5751) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5641; 1919 § 637; 1909 § 910
